# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Write a Jenkins Pipeline that accepts build parameters from users and executes them as shell commands. Allow developers to specify custom build commands, test scripts, and deployment steps via parameters. This provides maximum flexibility for different project types.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    parameters {
        string(name: 'BASH_COMMAND', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom shell command to execute')
        string(name: 'TEST_SCRIPT', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom test script to run')
        string(name: 'DEPLOYMENT_STEPS', defaultValue: '', description: 'Custom deployment steps')
    }

    stages {
        stage('Build & Execute Commands') {
            steps {
                sh "echo Running custom commands..."
                if (!params.BASH_COMMAND.isEmpty()) {
                    sh params.BASH_COMMAND
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Run Tests') {
            when {
                branch 'master'
            }
            steps {
                sh "echo Running tests with ${params.TEST_SCRIPT}..."
                if (!params.TEST_SCRIPT.isEmpty()) {
                    sh params.TEST_SCRIPT
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy') {
            when {
                branch 'master'
            }
            steps {
                sh "echo Deploying with ${params.DEPLOYMENT_STEPS}..."
                if (!params.DEPLOYMENT_STEPS.isEmpty()) {
                    sh params.DEPLOYMENT_STEPS
                }
            }
        }
    }
}
